title: Northrop (NOC) Wins $265M Deal to Aid the G/ATOR Program
text: Northrop (NOC) is set to provide sustaining engineering and logistics support services for the G/ATOR program.

title: LDOS or NOC: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors with an interest in Aerospace - Defense stocks have likely encountered both Leidos (LDOS) and Northrop Grumman (NOC). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?

title: RTX Secures a $94M Navy Contract to Support the ESSM Program
text: RTX Corp. RTX recently clinched a modification contract involving the Evolved Sea Sparrow Missile (ESSM) program. The award has been provided by the Naval Sea Systems Command, Washington, D.C.

title: Is This Private Space Company the Next SpaceX?
text: Firefly Aerospace has joined the ranks of space companies that successfully put satellites in orbit. Firefly is also planning an in-orbit satellite services business with its family of Elytra space tugs.

title: Northrop Grumman pulls out of UK narrowband military satellite tender - FT
text: U.S. defence company Northrop Grumman has pulled out of a competition to supply narrowband military satellite communications for Britain's armed forces, the Financial Times reported on Friday.

title: Bell-Boeing Clinches Contract to Support V-22 Jet Program
text: Bell-Boeing, a joint venture between Boeing (BA) and Bell Helicopter, a unit of Textron (TXT), is set to provide platform engineering and logistics sustainment support for the V-22 aircraft.

title: Northrop Grumman explores ammunition co-production in Poland
text: Northrop Grumman is exploring producing 120 millimetre tank ammunition in Poland as the U.S. ally surges defence production capacity, the company's chief told Reuters on Thursday.

title: RTX Secures a Contract to Support Dual Band Radar Systems
text: RTX's Dual Band Radar program is the first radar system of the U.S. Navy fleet, capable of operating simultaneously on two frequency ranges (S-band and X-band) coordinated by a single-resource manager.

title: Northrop Grumman Board Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., Nov. 15, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The board of directors of Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) declared a quarterly dividend of $1.87 per share on Northrop Grumman common stock, payable Dec. 13, 2023, to shareholders of record as of the close of business Nov. 27, 2023.

title: Northrop Grumman: Near-Term Risks But Long-Term Growth
text: Northrop Grumman's shares have lost 13% in the past year due to concerns about defense spending and budget outlook. The company reported strong Q3 results with increased revenue and orders, raising its revenue guidance for the year. However, uncertainties in defense spending and political risks may impact future growth, but the company is focused on returning capital to shareholders.

title: 15 stocks with the closest US government connections
text: Quiver Quantitative, the pioneering company behind an alternative data platform designed for retail investors, has been actively tracking stock market trades made by US Congress members and other political figures. Some of the trades have been notably controversial, mainly due to their timing or because they violated federal laws.

title: These defense stocks are most traded by US Congress
text: Recent weeks have witnessed a rising trend among Congress members and other prominent US politicians. They have been strategically investing in military-related stocks, with a keen focus on sectors encompassing defense, energy, and cybersecurity.

title: 2 sectors reducing debt and paying shareholders
text: Publicly traded companies utilize debt for many reasons. They can use it to fuel growth, pay dividends, or buy back shares, but like any financial entity, enough is enough.

title: Northrop Grumman (NOC) Just Flashed Golden Cross Signal: Do You Buy?
text: Northrop Grumman (NOC) reached a significant support level, and could be a good pick for investors from a technical perspective. Recently, NOC broke through the 20-day moving average, which suggests a short-term bullish trend.

title: This Megatrend Will Dominate In 2024 (And These 2 Dividends Will Soar)
text: Look, this deglobalization trend is hitting high gear—and if you miss your chance to tap it for surging dividend payouts, you will regret it down the road.
